ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Roger Meredith for and with Nathaniel Watkins

Mr. Meredith stated the case was opened for his client to pursue a medical malpractice suit, his client was not able to proceed with the suit, and there is no money to distribute. The Court stated that they should file a proper petition to close the estate in compliance with probate codes. The status of closing estate is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
